@@
A. Freeform text summary of the failure:
The agent attempted to filter Los Angeles businesses via business_description.MISC->>'city' (which errored and later revealed MISC contains non-location attributes) and then gave up instead of using the description column as hinted, i.e., it followed a correct plan but selected the wrong data field to identify Los Angeles businesses.
B. Failure modes encountered:
FM1: no
FM2: no
FM3: yes
FM4: no
@@
